text:
Once upon a time in the lush forest of Everwood, there lived a wise old owl named Oliver. Oliver knew many things: secrets of the ancient trees, whispers of the moonlit streams, and secrets locked inside old oaknuts. One gray afternoon, Oliver dreamed of finding the hardest nut anywhere.

Every year for decades, Oliver hunted these elusive nuts under the light of a red moon. One particular night, driven by hunger, Oliver ventured farther than usual. The branches grew thick.

After hours of careful stalking, Oliver discovered an impossible oak. His eyes widened. Before him stood only brown. But it pulsed!

With twitchy feathers, Oliver took a cautious bite. A sweet bitterness hit his nasal feathers. Oliver closed his eyes. Dreams come true. He flew back home satisfied.

You know what? Next time I think mystical—I'll find an owl feather necklace. It grows wherever dreams take flight.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
